description: Chapter 6 - Angular momentum. A guided structure for commutation relations, ladder algebra, spectra, matrices, differential operators and uncertainty.

topics.title: Angular momentum: chapter roadmap
topics.note: From the classical cross product to a quantum observable with noncommuting components and discrete projections.

topics.title: Angular momentum and Levi-Civita notation
topics.note: Operator components, index notation and the tensor identities used throughout the angular momentum algebra.

topics.title: Commutation relations and physical meaning
topics.note: Deriving the cyclic commutators and understanding why different components cannot be sharp simultaneously.

topics.title: Compatible observables: L squared and Lz
topics.note: Why total magnitude commutes with every component and how a common eigenbasis is selected.

topics.title: Raising and lowering operators
topics.note: Definitions, commutators, operator products and the ladder action that preserves total angular momentum.

topics.title: Quantization of l and m
topics.note: Ladder termination, endpoint states and the derivation of integer or half-integer angular momentum.

topics.title: Angular momentum spectrum
topics.note: Eigenvalues of L squared and Lz, multiplet dimension and the geometry of magnitude and projection.

topics.title: Normalized ladder action
topics.note: Transition amplitudes between neighboring m states and the endpoint coefficients of a finite multiplet.

topics.title: Expectation values and transverse variance
topics.note: Mean transverse components, quantum spread and the vector-cone interpretation of an angular momentum state.

topics.title: General matrix representation
topics.note: Matrix elements of Lz, L squared and the ladder operators for arbitrary l.

topics.title: Worked matrices and change of basis
topics.note: Explicit l = 1 and l = 1/2 examples, eigenvectors of transverse components and unitary basis transformations.

topics.title: Angular momentum in position space
topics.note: Orbital angular momentum as a differential operator and its purely angular character in spherical coordinates.

topics.title: Spherical harmonics as angular momentum eigenfunctions
topics.note: Differential eigenvalue equations, ladder construction and normalized angular wave functions.

topics.title: Generalized uncertainty for angular momentum
topics.note: Schwartz inequality, covariance and the uncertainty relation between noncommuting angular components.

topics.title: Chapter synthesis: angular momentum toolkit
topics.note: A compact bridge from commutators and multiplets to matrices, spherical harmonics and addition of angular momenta.
